input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure is an API/signature drift in old Maven artifact exception constructors between the tested code and 2.0.7, not missing setup.

Tests that try to run real Maven build goals may accidentally depend on network/plugin resolution; prefer local/temp filesystem scenarios or non-build CLI/API coverage unless Gradle/Native Image verification proves otherwise.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7 resolves its normal Maven/Plexus/ClassWorlds/Wagon runtime stack transitively, and meaningful coverage can target Maven core APIs, diagnosers, bundled resources, and MavenCli --version without extra dependencies, Docker services, or environment/system properties.
